editor_blueprints.title: Fixed Sandwich Shell
editor_blueprints.description: Fixed header and footer layout to prevent Android keyboard and notification bar interference.
editor_blueprints.css: body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100vh; overflow: hidden; } .main { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; }

editor_blueprints.title: File System Access Logic
editor_blueprints.description: Uses the browser's File System Access API to open a specific file from the Moto G35 storage and read its text content.
editor_blueprints.code: async function getFile() { const [fileHandle] = await window.showOpenFilePicker(); const file = await fileHandle.getFile(); return await file.text(); }
